name: Prism: Core Info
description: Reads general information from a PrismCore instance: version, current project, username, and useful paths.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import resolve_prism_core

class PrismCoreInfoNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Prism: Core Info"
    category = "DCCs"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__(use_exec=False)
        self.icon_path = "icons/prism_icon.png"
        self.add_input("core", "any")
        self.add_output("version", "string")
        self.add_output("project_name", "string")
        self.add_output("project_path", "string")
        self.add_output("username", "string")
        self.add_output("user_prefs_path", "string")

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        core = resolve_prism_core(inputs)
        if core is None:
            self.log_error("No PrismCore found. Add a prism_core_init node to your graph and connect its exec_out before this node.")
            return {'version':'','project_name':'','project_path':'','username':'','user_prefs_path':''}

        def _safe(attr):
            try: return str(getattr(core, attr, '') or '')
            except Exception: return ''

        out = {
            'version': _safe('version'),
            'project_name': _safe('projectName'),
            'project_path': _safe('projectPath'),
            'username': _safe('username'),
            'user_prefs_path': _safe('userPrefs') or _safe('prismRoot'),
        }
        self.log_info(f"Prism {out['version']} | project: {out['project_name']} | user: {out['username']}")
        return out

def register_node():
    return PrismCoreInfoNode
